testcase.name: Filter and sort available skills "before all" hook for "01 Filter active users by skill category and proficiency level"
testcase.classname: "before all" hook for "01 Filter active users by skill category and proficiency level"

failure.message:
Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find element: `input[name="availabilityStatus"][value="AVAILABLE"]`, but never found it.
Because this error occurred during a `before all` hook we are skipping the remaining tests in the current suite: `Filter and sort available s...`

testcase.failure:
